notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Zach Dezenzo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Zach Dezenzo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cam Smith plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cam Smith hit by pitch. Brice Matthews to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Zach Cole pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Cole grounds out to first baseman Kody Clemens.
